Genqi (源氣) is an energy that flows through people 

It is an abbreviation of Genital Qi or Generative Qi. 

All Genqi originates from [[alpha]] and emanates through [[lambda]] and eventually [[to Omega]].

It might be shortened to "Gen" in the future

[[Category:Ontology]]
[[sn:Genqi]][[Category:Alo]]
[[sn:Genqi]][[sn:Genqi]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
